# Moving only the iota anchor (the spec carrying `= iota`) is rejected.
# Users must move the whole iota block or refactor it manually.

! exec sflit -source big.go -sink small.go -regex '^KindUnknown$' -move
stderr 'cannot partially move iota const block'
cmp big.go expected_big.go
! exists small.go

-- big.go --
package p

type Kind int

const (
	KindUnknown Kind = iota
	KindA
	KindB
)
-- expected_big.go --
package p

type Kind int

const (
	KindUnknown Kind = iota
	KindA
	KindB
)
